docs.title: DeadChest Documentation
docs.text: Modern death-chest plugin for Bukkit ecosystems: Spigot, Paper, Purpur, Tuinity, and more. This documentation covers setup, configuration, integrations, and API usage.

docs.title: Compatibility
docs.text: Get Started Download Configuration

docs.title: Community
docs.text:
• Discord support
  • GitHub repository
  • Bukkit page

docs.title: DeadChest - API
docs.text: DeadChest exposes a public API for integrations.

docs.title: API class
docs.text: Use static methods from DeadChestAPI.

docs.title: Methods
docs.text: Method Description Available since public static List<ChestData> getChests(Player player) Return all known DeadChests for a player. 4.6.0 public static boolean giveBackChest(Player player, ChestData chest) Give back one specific chest inventory to a player. 4.6.0 public static boolean removeChest(ChestData chest) Remove a specific chest from world/storage. 4.7.0

docs.title: Events
docs.text: Event Description Available since DeadchestPickUpEvent Fired when a player picks up/claims a DeadChest. 4.7.0

docs.title: Notes
docs.text:
• Use null checks and online/offline checks for player-dependent operations.
  • Review behavior on full inventories depending on configured recovery mode.

docs.title: DeadChest - Commands & Permissions
docs.text:
Make sure you have installed the plugin before reading this section.

This page documents the current /dc commands and permission nodes.

docs.title: Commands
docs.text:
Command Permission Description /dc reload deadchest.admin Reload configuration and localization. /dc repair deadchest.admin Remove nearby broken legacy/DeadChest holograms around the executing player. /dc repair force deadchest.admin Force-remove nearby armor stand holograms around the executing player. /dc remove deadchest.remove.own Remove all of your own DeadChests. /dc remove <player> deadchest.remove.other Remove all DeadChests belonging to a specific player. /dc removeinfinite deadchest.admin Remove all infinite DeadChests. /dc removeall deadchest.admin Remove all DeadChests globally. /dc list deadchest.list.own* List your own DeadChests. /dc list <player> deadchest.list.other List DeadChests for a specific player. /dc list all deadchest.list.other List all DeadChests on the server. /dc giveback <player> deadchest.giveback Give back a player's oldest DeadChest inventory. /dc ignore deadchest.admin Open the ignore-items GUI/list.

* deadchest.list.own is only required when permissions.require-list-own: true in config.yml.

docs.title: Permission Nodes
docs.text: Permission Description deadchest.admin Access admin commands (reload, repair, removeall, removeinfinite, ignore). deadchest.generate Generate a DeadChest on death (if required by config). deadchest.get Claim/retrieve a DeadChest (if required by config). deadchest.chestPass Bypass owner-only chest access. deadchest.infinityChest Create infinite DeadChests. deadchest.remove.own Remove own DeadChests with /dc remove. deadchest.remove.other Remove another player's DeadChests with /dc remove <player>. deadchest.list.own List own DeadChests with /dc list (if required by config). deadchest.list.other List another player's/all DeadChests with /dc list <player> or /dc list all. deadchest.giveback Give back another player's items with /dc giveback <player>.

docs.title: Config-Dependent Permission Requirements
docs.text:
The following config flags control whether some actions require permissions:

  • permissions.require-generate: require deadchest.generate for chest generation.
  • permissions.require-claim: require deadchest.get for claiming chests.
  • permissions.require-list-own: require deadchest.list.own for /dc list.

docs.title: DeadChest - Configuration
docs.text:
Make sure you have installed the plugin before editing the configuration.

You can edit configuration by making change on config.yml file on the plugin folder

DeadChest now uses a structured config.yml (schema version 2) since v5.0.0. After any change, run /dc reload.

docs.title: Global
docs.text: Key Type Default Description config-version integer 2 Configuration schema version.

docs.title: Localization
docs.text: Key Type Default Description localization.language string en Language file loaded from plugins/DeadChest/localization/<language>.json (ex: en, fr, es, de, pt-br, pl, it, zh-cn).

docs.title: Updates
docs.text: Key Type Default Description updates.auto-check boolean true Enable automatic update checks at startup.

docs.title: Chest
docs.text: Key Type Default Description chest.owner-only-open boolean true Only owner can open chest (except deadchest.chestPass). chest.duration-seconds integer 300 Chest lifetime in seconds. 0 = infinite. chest.indestructible boolean true Protect chest block from destruction/explosions. chest.max-per-player integer 15 Max active chests per player. 0 = unlimited. chest.recovery-mode string inventory-then-ground inventory-then-ground or ground-drop. chest.block-type string chest chest, player-head, barrel, shulker-box, ender-chest. chest.drop-items-on-timeout boolean false On timeout: drop items (true) or remove contents (false).

docs.title: Permissions
docs.text: Key Type Default Description permissions.require-generate boolean false Require deadchest.generate to create chest on death. permissions.require-claim boolean false Require deadchest.get to claim/retrieve chest. permissions.require-list-own boolean false Require deadchest.list.own for /dc list.

docs.title: Maintenance
docs.text: Key Type Default Description maintenance.cleanup-on-startup boolean false Remove all DeadChests on server startup.

docs.title: Generation Rules
docs.text: Key Type Default Description generation.allow-in-creative boolean true Allow chest generation on death in Creative mode. generation.allow-on-lava boolean true Allow generation when death occurs in lava. generation.allow-on-water boolean true Allow generation when death occurs in water. generation.allow-on-rails boolean true Allow generation when death occurs on rails. generation.allow-in-minecart boolean true Allow generation when death occurs in minecart. generation.allow-in-end-worlds boolean true Allow generation in The End worlds.

docs.title: Messages
docs.text: Key Type Default Description messages.display-position-on-death boolean true Send chest coordinates to player on death.

docs.title: XP
docs.text: Key Type Default Description xp.store-on-death boolean false Store XP in chest instead of normal orb drop. xp.store-percentage integer 100 XP percent stored when enabled (0 to 100, values >100 duplicate XP).

docs.title: PvP
docs.text: Key Type Default Description pvp.keep-inventory-on-player-kill boolean false On PvP death: keep inventory and skip DeadChest generation.

docs.title: Integrations
docs.text: Key Type Default Description integrations.worldguard.enabled boolean false Enable WorldGuard region checks. integrations.worldguard.default-allow boolean false Default region policy if no DeadChest flag is set.

docs.title: Durability
docs.text: Key Type Default Description durability.loss-on-death-percent integer 0 Durability loss on death (percentage of max durability). 0 disables.

docs.title: Logging
docs.text: Key Type Default Description logging.deadchest-create-to-console boolean false Log each chest creation in console.

docs.title: Visuals - Effect Animation
docs.text: Key Type Default Description visuals.effect-animation.enabled boolean true Enable orbit particles around active DeadChests. visuals.effect-animation.style string ender Effect style: soul, flame, ender. visuals.effect-animation.radius number 0.8 Orbit radius around chest center. visuals.effect-animation.speed number 1.1 Orbit speed multiplier.

docs.title: Visuals - Pickup Animation
docs.text: Key Type Default Description visuals.pickup-animation.enabled boolean true Enable animation when a player claims a chest. visuals.pickup-animation.particle string FIREWORK Bukkit particle name used for pickup animation. visuals.pickup-animation.count integer 22 Number of particles spawned. visuals.pickup-animation.offset-x number 0.45 Particle spread on X axis. visuals.pickup-animation.offset-y number 0.5 Particle spread on Y axis. visuals.pickup-animation.offset-z number 0.45 Particle spread on Z axis. visuals.pickup-animation.speed number 0.08 Particle extra/speed value. visuals.pickup-animation.y-shift number 0.55 Vertical center offset from block base.

docs.title: Visuals - Pickup Sound
docs.text: Key Type Default Description visuals.sound.pickup.enabled boolean true Enable sound on chest pickup. visuals.sound.pickup.name string ENTITY_PLAYER_LEVELUP Bukkit sound name. visuals.sound.pickup.volume number 1.2 Sound volume. visuals.sound.pickup.pitch number 1.0 Sound pitch.

docs.title: Filters
docs.text: Key Type Default Description filters.excluded-worlds list Example values Worlds where DeadChest generation is disabled. filters.excluded-items list Example values Items that are not stored in DeadChest. filters.ignored-items list Example values Items ignored by DeadChest processing (not stored and not removed).

docs.title: Permission reference
docs.text:
• deadchest.admin: admin commands (reload, repair, removeall, removeinfinite, ignore)
  • deadchest.generate: generate chest on death (if required)
  • deadchest.get: claim/retrieve chest (if required)
  • deadchest.list.own: list own chests (if required)
  • deadchest.list.other: list another player's chests
  • deadchest.remove.own: remove own chests
  • deadchest.remove.other: remove another player's chests
  • deadchest.giveback: give back another player's items
  • deadchest.chestPass: bypass owner-only chest access
  • deadchest.infinityChest: create infinite chests

docs.title: DeadChest - Contribution
docs.text: Contributions are welcome.

docs.title: Code contributions
docs.text:
If you want to propose improvements:

  1. Fork the repository.
  2. Create a feature/fix branch.
  3. Open a pull request with a clear description:
  4. what changed
  5. why it changed
  6. any migration/compatibility impact

Repository: apavarino/Deadchest

docs.title: Reporting issues
docs.text:
When opening an issue, include:

  • server software and version
  • Java version
  • DeadChest version
  • relevant config section
  • logs/stack traces

docs.title: Support the project
docs.text:
If you want to support development, you can donate via PayPal:

  • Donate

docs.title: DeadChest - Customization
docs.text: This section explains how to customize DeadChest with the current configuration system.

docs.title: What can be customized
docs.text:
You can customize:

  • Language and messages (localization JSON files)
  • Visual effects around chests
  • Pickup animation particles
  • Pickup sound

Most visual/audio settings are in config.yml under visuals.*.

docs.title: Localization files
docs.text:
DeadChest uses JSON localization files located in:

plugins/DeadChest/localization/

Examples of bundled languages:

  • en.json
  • fr.json
  • es.json
  • de.json
  • pt-br.json
  • pl.json
  • it.json
  • zh-cn.json

Select active language in config.yml:

localization:
  language: en

docs.title: Placeholders in messages
docs.text:
Current placeholders use indexed format:

  • {0}
  • {1}
  • {2}

Example:

"commands.list.title.player": "DeadChests of {0}"

docs.title: Colors and formatting
docs.text:
Minecraft formatting codes are supported in localization strings.

  • Use § codes in text if needed.
  • Keep valid JSON syntax (quotes, commas, escaping).

docs.title: Legacy migration note
docs.text: If you used old locale.yml, DeadChest migrates it automatically to localization/en.json on startup and archives the legacy file.

docs.title: Visual customization (config.yml)
docs.text:
You can tune visuals in these sections:

  • visuals.effect-animation.*
  • visuals.pickup-animation.*
  • visuals.sound.pickup.*

Quick reference:

Key Description visuals.effect-animation.style Orbit style (soul, flame, ender). visuals.effect-animation.radius Orbit radius around chest. visuals.effect-animation.speed Orbit speed multiplier. visuals.pickup-animation.particle Particle used on pickup. visuals.pickup-animation.count Number of particles. visuals.sound.pickup.name Bukkit sound played on pickup. visuals.sound.pickup.volume Pickup sound volume. visuals.sound.pickup.pitch Pickup sound pitch.

For full option list, see configuration.

docs.title: Apply changes
docs.text:
• Run /dc reload after editing config.yml or localization files.
  • Validate server logs if a JSON formatting error occurs.

docs.title: DeadChest - Download
docs.text:
You can download DeadChest from the official sources below:

  • BukkitDev
  • CurseForge
  • GitHub (build from source)

Warning

Avoid downloading the plugin from unofficial mirrors.

docs.title: Requirements
docs.text:
• Minecraft server version: 1.13+
  • Java runtime: Java 8+

Supported server implementations include:

  • Bukkit
  • Spigot
  • Paper
  • Tuinity
  • Purpur
  • Most Bukkit/Spigot derivatives

docs.title: DeadChest - How It Works
docs.text: This page explains how DeadChest behaves in common gameplay situations.

docs.title: Default behavior
docs.text:
When a player dies, DeadChest creates a protected chest at a suitable location near the death point. By default:

  • chest access is owner-only
  • a hologram shows owner and remaining time
  • the chest expires after configured timeout (unless infinite)

All behavior is configurable in configuration.

docs.title: Chest placement rules
docs.text: DeadChest never intentionally replaces solid blocks. If the exact death block is invalid, it searches for the nearest valid location.

docs.title: Overworld, Nether, End, custom worlds
docs.text: The same placement logic is used in all worlds.

docs.title: Death below the world
docs.text: DeadChest clamps to the lowest valid height for that world at the same horizontal position.

docs.title: Death above world max height
docs.text: DeadChest clamps to the highest valid height for that world at the same horizontal position.

docs.title: Death on non-placeable spots (doors, rails, torches, etc.)
docs.text: If the exact block cannot host a chest, DeadChest searches for the next valid free space.

docs.title: Water and lava deaths
docs.text:
DeadChest can generate in these environments if enabled:

  • generation.allow-on-water
  • generation.allow-on-lava

docs.title: Item handling
docs.text:
• Items with Curse of Vanishing are not stored.
  • Retrieval behavior depends on chest.recovery-mode.

docs.title: Protection and anti-grief behavior
docs.text: Depending on config, DeadChests are protected against unauthorized access and destruction. This includes owner checks and block protection logic.

docs.title: Performance model
docs.text: DeadChest is designed for active servers and focuses work on loaded areas/chunks to limit overhead.

docs.title: DeadChest - Installation
docs.text: Make sure you have downloaded the plugin first.

docs.title: Install steps
docs.text:
1. Stop your server.
  2. Put DeadChest-X.X.X.jar into your plugins/ folder.
  3. Start the server.
  4. Confirm startup in console logs.

Expected log example:

[DeadChest] Enabling DeadChest vX.X.X

docs.title: First checks
docs.text:
• Confirm no startup errors are shown.
  • Verify plugins/DeadChest/ was generated.
  • Run /dc list in-game (with proper permission) to confirm command registration.

If you encounter issues, check troubleshooting or ask on Discord.

docs.title: DeadChest - Troubleshooting
docs.text: This page covers common issues and quick fixes.

docs.title: Ghost/leftover hologram
docs.text:
Use:

/dc repair

If needed, use the force variant:

/dc repair force

You need admin permission (deadchest.admin) for repair commands.

docs.title: DeadChest not behaving as expected after update
docs.text:
1. Check your server version and Java version match plugin requirements.
  2. Run /dc reload after config changes.
  3. Verify config.yml was migrated correctly to schema version 2.
  4. Check startup logs for localization/config parsing warnings.

Note

Avoid deleting plugin data unless you know the impact on active chests.

docs.title: Commands not working
docs.text:
• Ensure command is /dc ...
  • Verify required permissions for your user/group
  • Check permissions.require-* settings in config

docs.title: WorldGuard behavior is incorrect
docs.text:
• Ensure integrations.worldguard.enabled: true
  • Verify region flags (dc-owner, dc-member, dc-guest)
  • Check integrations.worldguard.default-allow

docs.title: Need more help
docs.text:
• Share startup logs and relevant config sections when asking for support.
  • Join Discord support from the home page links.

docs.title: DeadChest - WorldGuard Integration
docs.text: DeadChest can use WorldGuard regions to control where a DeadChest may be generated.

docs.title: Prerequisites
docs.text:
• DeadChest installed and running
  • WorldGuard installed
  • Integration enabled in config.yml

docs.title: Enable integration
docs.text:
Set the following keys in config.yml:

integrations:
  worldguard:
    enabled: true
    default-allow: false
  • enabled: activates WorldGuard checks.
  • default-allow: fallback when no explicit DeadChest flag result applies.

docs.title: DeadChest WorldGuard flags
docs.text:
DeadChest registers these custom region flags:

Flag Meaning dc-owner Region owners can generate DeadChest in the region. dc-member Region members can generate DeadChest in the region. dc-guest Any player can generate DeadChest in the region.

docs.title: How flags are evaluated
docs.text:
At death location, DeadChest checks regions and applies logic in this order:

  1. If dc-owner=allow and player is owner -> allow.
  2. If dc-member=allow and player is member -> allow.
  3. If owner/member flags explicitly deny -> deny.
  4. If dc-guest=allow -> allow.
  5. If dc-guest=deny -> deny.
  6. Otherwise fallback to integrations.worldguard.default-allow.

docs.title: Example commands (WorldGuard)
docs.text:
Command syntax may vary slightly by WorldGuard version, but typically:

/rg flag <region> dc-owner allow
/rg flag <region> dc-member allow
/rg flag <region> dc-guest deny

docs.title: Verify integration
docs.text:
• Restart/reload server.
  • Check console logs for WorldGuard detection and flag behavior.
  • Test player deaths in and out of flagged regions.

docs.title: Troubleshooting
docs.text:
• If no custom flags appear, ensure WorldGuard is loaded before DeadChest check happens.
  • If behavior seems global, verify the exact region at death location.
  • If unsure, temporarily set default-allow: true to compare behavior.
